message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontName Arial
skinparam noteTextAlignment center
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteCornerRadius 5
skinparam noteMargin 5
skinparam notePadding 10
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam noteFontColor #000000
skinparam noteFontSize 12
skinparam noteFontStyle plain
skinparam noteFontName Arial
skinparam noteTextAlignment center
skinparam noteShadowing false
skinparam noteBorderThickness 1
skinparam noteCornerRadius 5
skinparam noteMargin 5

participant "client" as client
participant "fastAPI" as fastAPI
participant "JobsCollection" as JobsCollection
participant "Poller" as Poller
participant "IngestService" as IngestService
participant "MappingIngestor" as MappingIngestor
participant "MongoSerializer" as MongoSerializer
participant "DatabrokerCollections" as DatabrokerCollections
participant "SciCatIngestor" as SciCatIngestor
participant "Catamel" as Catamel

client -> fastAPI: file ready to ingest
activate fastAPI
fastAPI -> JobsCollection: create Job
activate JobsCollection
JobsCollection --> Poller: poll for job
activate Poller
Poller -> IngestService: ingest
activate IngestService
IngestService -> MappingIngestor: ingest
activate MappingIngestor
MappingIngestor -> MongoSerializer: send docs
activate MongoSerializer
MongoSerializer -> DatabrokerCollections: Persist docstream
activate DatabrokerCollections
IngestService -> SciCatIngestor: ingest
activate SciCatIngestor
SciCatIngestor -> Catamel: many messages
activate Catamel
deactivate Catamel
deactivate SciCatIngestor
deactivate DatabrokerCollections
deactivate MongoSerializer
deactivate MappingIngestor
deactivate IngestService
deactivate Poller
deactivate JobsCollection
deactivate fastAPI

@enduml
